name: public_safety_port_security_scanner_flags_mesa_lib_eq
premise: Wildfire evacuation routes are jammed; police want contraflow lanes that cut off hospital access from the east. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety port security scanner flags mesa lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The trade is not abstract: it is liberty versus equality under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Harper Nowak
agents.identity: I am Harper Nowak, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Elliot Patel
agents.identity: I am Elliot Patel, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect equality.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to equality to secure liberty before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Harper Nowak must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Harper Nowak do?
